calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: B.D. Thakor, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Robert Montoya.
Exhibit 1- Three-Day Notice------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 20 12th Street #519, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $1,900.00 & Holdover Damages $1,229.00
Costs $230.00 for a Total of $3,359.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID G. MENDEZ, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF B. D. THAKOR, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT ROBERT MONTOYA.

THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER TAKEN OFF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR THIS DAY, DUE TO NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ROBERT MONTOYA; THE TRIAL DATE REMAINS FOR TUESDAY, OCT-09-2007.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D218/206).
